name: screen_ocr returns text from a generated bitmap
description: Renders a PNG with known text using System.Drawing, OCRs it via Windows.Media.Ocr, and asserts the recognized text contains the known string. Skips on non-Windows or when no OCR language pack is installed.

args.command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object Drawing.Bitmap(400,80); $g = [Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bmp); $g.Clear([Drawing.Color]::White); $font = New-Object Drawing.Font('Arial', 28, [Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold); $brush = [Drawing.Brushes]::Black; $g.DrawString('Hello OCR World', $font, $brush, 10, 10); $bmp.Save([IO.Path]::Combine($env:TEMP, 'csimple-ocr-fixture.png')); $g.Dispose(); $bmp.Dispose(); Write-Output 'wrote'
